title: Role Tuning Profiles
description: Defines allowed temperature bounds per adapter role. Used by validate.py to enforce correct inference tuning config when contributors create or modify adapters.

brain.description: Router — classification/routing, low temperature for determinism

nerve.description: Tool caller — structured JSON output, low temperature for reliability

awareness.description: Identity/persona — moderate temperature for natural responses

creative.description: Generative — style/fluency, higher temperature for expressiveness

code.description: Code planner — precise output, low temperature for correctness

vision.description: Image analysis — low temperature for factual accuracy

touch.description: File/system interaction — low temperature for precision

hearing.description: Audio processing — low temperature for accuracy

sight.description: Visual perception — low temperature for accuracy
